query: WITH entities AS (SELECT id FROM jobs WHERE (NOT $1 OR parent_job_id IS NOT DISTINCT FROM $2) AND (COALESCE(id > $4, true)) ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT $3) SELECT i.id AS "entity_id: Repo__Id", e.sequence, e.event, CASE WHEN $5 THEN e.context ELSE NULL::jsonb END as "context: es_entity::ContextData", e.recorded_at, NULL::jsonb as "forgettable_payload?" FROM entities i JOIN job_events e ON i.id = e.id ORDER BY i.id asc, i.id, e.sequence
